title: Account for more durable waves when judging resets and roams
body: Patch 26.9 moderately increases minion wave durability around mid and late laning phase. That can make stacked waves build for longer and slightly widen windows where a player can reset, move, or hover before the wave fully collapses.
actionables: Review reset mistakes by checking whether the player used the larger wave timer or left before creating one.
When a roam succeeds, verify whether wave durability and stacking made the move low-cost rather than assuming it was free in every patch.
Teach players to create the wave state first, then move; the patch rewards planned tempo more than random wandering.

source.title: League of Legends Patch 26.9 Notes
source.notes: Derived from the Game Systems / Minion Waves changes in Patch 26.9.
